name: agency-demo-01
description: White-label proof-of-work: pixel-perfect WordPress build of the Whitepace SaaS Landing V2 Figma (Noircraft Lab).

scripts.build:wp: sass src/scss/main.scss theme/agency-demo-01/assets/css/main.css --style=expanded --source-map && npm run sync:wp
scripts.sync:wp: xcopy /E /Y /I /Q assets\img theme\agency-demo-01\assets\img && xcopy /E /Y /I /Q src\js theme\agency-demo-01\assets\js
